name: Supreme King Gate Zero
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>覇</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>は</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>王</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>おう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>門</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>もん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>零</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ゼロ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc:
[ Pendulum Effect ] 
If you control "Supreme King Z-ARC", you take no damage. Once per turn, if you have "Supreme King Gate Infinity" in your other Pendulum Zone: You can destroy both cards in your Pendulum Zones, and if you do, add 1 "Polymerization" Spell or "Fusion" Spell from your Deck to your hand.

[ Monster Effect ] 
Once per turn: You can target 1 other face-up card you control; destroy both it and this card, and if you do, Special Summon 1 Dragon Fusion or Synchro Monster from your Extra Deck, but its ATK/DEF become 0, its effects are negated, also it cannot be used as material for a Synchro or Xyz Summon. If this card in the Monster Zone is destroyed by battle or card effect: You can place this card in your Pendulum Zone.
pend_eff: If you control "Supreme King Z-ARC", you take no damage. Once per turn, if you have "Supreme King Gate Infinity" in your other Pendulum Zone: You can destroy both cards in your Pendulum Zones, and if you do, add 1 "Polymerization" Spell or "Fusion" Spell from your Deck to your hand.

If this card in the Monster Zone is destroyed by battle or card effect: You can place this card in your Pendulum Zone.

action: Activates if other Pendulum Zone is occupied by specific card
Activates if destroyed by card effect
mst: Negates the effects of the Summoned monsters
summoning: Special Summons from your Extra Deck
Cannot be used as a Synchro Material
Cannot be used as an Xyz Material
